title: Utility Type
description: Apply built-in TypeScript transformations like Partial or Readonly to existing interfaces.
problemStatement:
Powerful transformations! Given a `Todo` interface with `title` and `description`, declare a variable that is a `Partial<Todo>`.

**Requirement:** This variable should allow you to provide only one of the properties.
hints: Utility types like `Partial` make all properties in an interface optional automatically.
expectedOutput: A partial object that doesn't error when missing fields
